keys.description: The /events/upcoming endpoint — 20 events with status IN (announced, registration_open, registration_closed, in_progress) sorted by starts_at asc. 60-second TTL.
invalidatedBy: EventObserver.updated (starts_at OR status OR visibility touched)

keys.description: Full event list for a tenant. Small payload (id, name, slug, status, starts_at, primary_facility_id).
Full Event row + facilities eager-loaded. Read on every event detail page + by EventPhaseCalculator.
Precomputed registration-window state (is_open / opens_at / closes_at / is_late_window). Read by event.enforce_registration_open middleware on every Wave 3+ enrollment request.
invalidatedBy: EventObserver.updated (registration timestamps OR status OR allow_late_registration changed)

keys.description: Cached phase evaluation for an event (draft / announced / registration_open / registration_closed / in_progress / completed / cancelled / archived). 30-second TTL because phase can transition at hour boundaries.
invalidatedBy: EventObserver.updated (status OR starts_at OR ends_at OR registration timestamps changed)

keys.description: Full event_facilities list for one event + facility metadata eager-loaded. Read on event detail page + by ReconcileEventFacilityBookingsJob.
Cooling-off cache marker set by ExpireEventCoolingOffJob. Presence indicates the event was cancelled recently (within event.cooling_off.window_hours) and cannot be re-opened yet.
Dedupe marker for NotifyEventReminderJob (window: T-24h / T-1h). Prevents double-firing when the job re-runs within the reminder window.
Timestamp of the last successful ReconcileEventFacilityBookingsJob run. Read by health probe.

Public listings for the tenant (visibility=public + status IN (announced, registration_open, registration_closed, in_progress)). Longer TTL because public listings change less frequently. Read by the tenant marketing page.
